import { createHotContext as __vite__createHotContext } from "/@vite/client";import.meta.hot = __vite__createHotContext("/src/app/pages/platform-admin/StandardsMapping.tsx");import { jsxDEV } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-jsx-dev-runtime";
import * as RefreshRuntime from "/@react-refresh";
const inWebWorker = typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== "undefined" && self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope;
let prevRefreshReg;
let prevRefreshSig;
if (import.meta.hot && !inWebWorker) {
  if (!window.$RefreshReg$) {
    throw new Error(
      "@vitejs/plugin-react can't detect preamble. Something is wrong."
    );
  }
  prevRefreshReg = window.$RefreshReg$;
  prevRefreshSig = window.$RefreshSig$;
  window.$RefreshReg$ = RefreshRuntime.getRefreshReg("/workspaces/default/code/src/app/pages/platform-admin/StandardsMapping.tsx");
  window.$RefreshSig$ = RefreshRuntime.createSignatureFunctionForTransform;
}
var _s = $RefreshSig$();
import { FGCmp } from "/@id/fginspector";
import { useState } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
import { Link2, TrendingUp, X, Sparkles, CheckCircle2, AlertTriangle, Download, FileBarChart } from "/node_modules/.vite/deps/lucide-react.js?v=25293e4c";
export default function StandardsMapping() {
  _s();
  const [selectedLegislation, setSelectedLegislation] = useState(null);
  const [selectedPolicy, setSelectedPolicy] = useState(null);
  const [mappings, setMappings] = useState([]);
  const [showAISuggestModal, setShowAISuggestModal] = useState(false);
  const [showCoverageModal, setShowCoverageModal] = useState(false);
  const legislationClauses = [
    { id: "L1", title: "OSHA 1910.38 - Emergency Action Plans", confidence: 95 },
    { id: "L2", title: "OSHA 1910.157 - Fire Extinguishers", confidence: 88 },
    { id: "L3", title: "OSHA 1910.165 - Fire Alarm Systems", confidence: 92 }
  ];
  const policyClauses = [
    { id: "P1", title: "Emergency Evacuation Procedures - Section 2.1" },
    { id: "P2", title: "Fire Safety Equipment - Section 3.4" },
    { id: "P3", title: "Alarm Response Protocol - Section 4.2" }
  ];
  const handleLinkClause = () => {
    if (selectedLegislation && selectedPolicy) {
      setMappings([...mappings, { legislation: selectedLegislation, policy: selectedPolicy }]);
      setSelectedLegislation(null);
      setSelectedPolicy(null);
    }
  };
